name: 2'x3' Washable Reversible Scatter Indoor/Outdoor Accent Rug Black/White - Threshold™: Check Pattern, Polypropylene, Flat Pile
description:
Make any area in your house more welcoming with this Indoor/Outdoor Reversible Scatter Rug from Threshold™. Woven with a sturdy material for durability, this reversible scatter rug helps protect your floors while adding just the right touch of texture and interest to any room. This beautiful reversible rug takes your decor to the next level with its two-toned checkered pattern on one side and simple stripes on the back. Just place this reversible rug inside or out for the perfect finishing touch to any of your spaces. Clean with water from standard garden hose. If used indoors, rug pad recommended.


Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
